name: UNITED BANKSHARES INC/WV
business: United Bankshares, Inc. is a financial holding company whose primary business is community banking through its subsidiary United Bank. It offers a full range of commercial and retail banking services including deposits, loans, trust services, mortgage banking, asset management, and brokerage services. The company serves individuals, businesses, and public entities primarily in West Virginia, Virginia, Maryland, North Carolina, South Carolina, Georgia, and the District of Columbia.

exposures.sentence: As of December 31, 2025, approximately $322.5 million or 1.30% of United s total loan portfolio were for the purpose of extracting, manufacturing and distributing oil, coal and natural gas.
As of December 31, 2025, approximately $11.9 billion or 48.16% of United s total loan portfolio were for real estate and construction.
As of December 31, 2025, approximately $1.6 billion or 6.40% of United s total loan portfolio were to hotels and other traveler accommodations.
